title: DonutSMP Modpack
description: The best and only good Client Modpack Choice for the DonutSMP!
body:
# DonutSMP Modpack
The best and only good Client Modpack Choice for the DonutSMP!

![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21.11-blue)
![Java](https://img.shields.io/badge/Java-21-orange)
![Platform](https://img.shields.io/badge/Platform-Fabric-green)
![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-ARR-red)

---

**Built for DonutSMP. Clean. Optimized. Ready to launch.**

This is not one of those overloaded, random modpacks.  
DonutSMP Modpack 2.0.0 was rebuilt from scratch for one purpose:  
**maximum performance and competitive gameplay on DonutSMP.**

No unnecessary clutter. No broken configs. Just install and play.

---

## Why DonutSMP Modpack?

| | Random Modpacks | DonutSMP Modpack |
|---|---|---|
| Setup | Manual config needed | Ready instantly |
| Performance | Inconsistent | Fully optimized |
| PvP Features | Missing or bloated | Clean & focused |
| Compatibility | Mixed mods | 100% DonutSMP allowed |
| Visuals | Default or messy | Clean & enhanced |

---

## Features

- **Performance First**
  Powered by Sodium + Sodium Extra + multiple optimizers for smooth gameplay even in intense fights.

- **PvP Ready**
  Includes crystal optimizations, freelook, armor HUD, totem counter and more — everything you actually need.

- **Clean Visual Experience**
  Better Clouds, Fullbright (Gamma Utils), improved screens and UI tweaks for a modern look.

- **Quality of Life**
  - Shulker previews  
  - AppleSkin  
  - Chat history improvements  
  - Better configs via Mod Menu & YACL  

- **Immersive Gameplay**
  Simple Voice Chat fully integrated — talk without leaving the game.

- **Zero Setup**
  Launch and play instantly. Some features can be configured, but nothing is required.

---

## Included Core Mods

- Sodium / Sodium Extra / Reese’s Options  
- Simple Voice Chat  
- ItemPhysic  
- Better Clouds  
- AppleSkin  
- Shulker Box Tooltip  
- Bobby  
- TotemCounter  
- Freelook  
- + many more performance & PvP-focused tweaks  

All mods are **fully allowed on DonutSMP**.

---

## Installation

1. Click on Install if you are in the Modrinth App
2. Wait for the Download
3. Launch the game  
4. Join DonutSMP  

Done.

---

---
